form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Coffs Harbour Bm82 September 14 over 1315m, soft track; 6 len behind Prince Of Sorts with 62.5kg at $4.20. When resuming last campaign fifth of 8 at Doomben Bm62 January 27 2025 over 1110m, 2.25 len behind Try Everything with 58.5kg at $7.50. Speedy gelding and not to be overlooked.
